description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow has three jobs: build-and-test-ubuntu, build-and-test-windows, and build-and-test-flavors. The ubuntu job runs on ubuntu-latest, updates packages, installs dependencies, and builds and runs tests. The windows job runs on windows-latest, sets up MSVC, installs dependencies, generates project files, builds projects, and runs tests. The flavors job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest with different Docker images, launches a container, updates packages, installs dependencies, and builds and runs the project.
